sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82605" key="periw|dika/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιῳδ-ικά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n82605.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">metrical systems in which the strophic correspondence is of the form a b b b . . c</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>, cf. Sch.</sense> </entryFree>
